title: TPSRX - Enchanted
description: An optimized and immersive modpack that enhances visuals, boosts performance, and brings a magical touch to the TopStrix experience.
body:
**TopStrix Enchanted Modpack for Minecraft Server**  

Embark on a magical journey with the **TopStrix Enchanted Modpack**, exclusively designed for the **TopStrix Minecraft Server**. This meticulously curated collection of mods enhances visuals, boosts performance, and adds immersive, magical elements to the world of Minecraft.  
The Modpack also includes the **TopStrix Server** pre configured, ready for you to join instantly and begin your adventure!  

---

**Installation Made Easy**  

To begin your journey with the **TopStrix Enchanted Modpack**, simply install the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app). Unsure how to set it up? We've got you covered with a step-by-step [Guide](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth). It's quick, easy, and ensures you’re ready to experience the enchanted TopStrix server in minutes.  

---

**Modpack Contents**  

Explore a thoughtfully selected list of mods, each chosen to optimize gameplay, improve visuals, and deepen immersion in the TopStrix experience:  

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) – High-performance rendering engine for significantly improved FPS and smooth visuals.  
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) – Adds support for advanced shaders to achieve stunning lighting and reflections.  
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) – Improves game logic efficiency, enhancing overall performance.  
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) – Reduces memory usage to keep the game lightweight and responsive.   
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) – Adds subtle particle effects and ambient visuals for a magical atmosphere.  
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) – Enables dynamic lighting for torches, lanterns, and glowing entities.  
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) – Adds smooth first-person animations for better realism.  
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) – Boosts performance by hiding unseen entities and blocks.  
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) – Core library providing essential modding hooks for Fabric-based mods.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) – Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) – Config systems provided to other modding ecosystems.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) – Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) – A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) – Usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) – A zoom mod with infinite customizability.
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) – Enables proximity voice chat with realistic spatial audio.
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) – Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality.
